all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Sojourn in this land, and I will be with thee, and will bless thee; for unto thee, and unto thy seed, I will give all these countries, and I will perform the oath which I sware unto Abraham thy father;
Genesis 26:3
Quote of the Day
"Primary songs can become a child’s first spiritual language because their simple, memorable melodies give voice to gospel truths."
Sister Tracy Y. Browning | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
